title: pelargonium × aemulum
intro: Pelargonium × aemulum, also known as Cape Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Pelargonium genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds. The health benefits of Cape Geranium include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in soothing sore throats and reducing fever. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for the extraction of its active compounds for therapeutic purposes.
